How Much of Your Post Does AI Search Actually Grab? Breaking Down Claude's WebSearch and WebFetch

This post digs into how much of your blog AI actually pulls in when it does a web search. I went through Anthropic's official web_search and web_fetch tool specs, broke down the fact that the search stage only returns title + URL, the 150-character cited_text cap, and Claude Code's built-in WebFetch using Haiku 3.5 to summarize a 100 KB truncation, then ran a real test against my own blog. Wraps up with four actionable AEO writing tips: titles that carry their own context, lead with the answer, design single sentences that can be quoted standalone, and use structure as navigation markers.
